hero.title: Tamil Isai Sangamam
hero.eventDetail: இந்த நிகழ்வு வியாழன், 2026 அக்டோபர் 1 அன்று நடைபெறும்.

intro.title: A Legacy of Sound, A Union of Souls
intro.desc1: Tamil Isai Sangamam is not just a festival; it is a historic pilgrimage of sound. For the first time in musical history, the titans of Tamil cinema, state icons, and legendary maestros unite on a single, monumental stage.
intro.desc2: From the divine acoustic symphonies of our legends to the high-octane cybernetic rave finales, experience the heartbeat of Tamil culture through centuries of musical evolution.

vijay.name: Joseph Vijay
vijay.title: Chief Minister of Tamil Nadu
vijay.desc: The People's Leader. From commanding the silver screen to leading the state, Thalapathy Vijay graces the Sangamam as the Guest of Honour.

stalin.name: M. K. Stalin
stalin.title: Former Chief Minister
stalin.desc: A veteran statesman and cultural patron who has championed Tamil arts and heritage across decades of public service.

kamal.name: Kamal Haasan
kamal.title: Ulaga Nayagan
kamal.desc: The Universal Hero. Actor, director, screenwriter, and cultural ambassador — a living legend of Indian cinema.

rajini.name: Rajinikanth
rajini.title: Superstar
rajini.desc: The one and only Superstar. His magnetic presence alone transforms any stage into a pilgrimage for millions.

maniratnam.name: Mani Ratnam
maniratnam.title: Visionary Director
maniratnam.desc: The maestro of visual poetry. Mani Ratnam's cinema redefined how music and visuals intertwine in storytelling.

shankar.name: Shankar
shankar.title: Blockbuster Director
shankar.desc: India's spectacle filmmaker. Known for pushing the boundaries of scale, technology, and musical grandeur.

schedule.sectionSubtitle: One Day. Four Acts. Infinite Memories.

morning.label: Morning Session
morning.title: The Grand Overture
morning.desc: Ilaiyaraaja & A.R. Rahman orchestral symphonies opening the gates of musical nirvana.

afternoon.label: Afternoon Session
afternoon.title: Nostalgic Waves
afternoon.desc: Harris Jayaraj, DSP & G.V. Prakash weave melodies that transport you through decades of Tamil cinema.

evening.label: Evening Session
evening.title: Sunset Inferno
evening.desc: Vijay Antony, Santhosh Narayanan & the street beats crew set the arena ablaze with raw energy.

night.label: Night Session
night.title: The Grand Gathering
night.desc: Anirudh Ravichander commands the stage for the ultimate high-frequency cybernetic rave finale. Where all artist and guest came together in Single Stage!

stadium.seniorNote: Fast-track priority entry at Gate 3 with acoustically dampened seating.

safety.ageRestriction: Strictly 18+ Entry — Valid physical government-issued photo ID required at gates.
safety.decibelWarning: Audio levels exceed 100dB+ in front zones. Ear protection strongly recommended.
safety.medicalWarning: Strictly prohibited for pregnant women and individuals with cardiac conditions or pacemakers.
safety.consent: By purchasing a ticket, you acknowledge all risks associated with high-decibel live music events.

aboutPage.title: About Tamil Isai Sangamam
aboutPage.subtitle: Bridging Generations Through Music
aboutPage.introTitle: A Grand Union of Music & Heritage
aboutPage.para1: Tamil Isai Sangamam is South Asia's most spectacular, high-prestige music festival, celebrating the timeless spirit and monumental legacy of Tamil musical heritage. Held at the historic Jawaharlal Nehru Stadium in Chennai, this event bridges the gap between classical, traditional folk, nostalgic cinematic melodies, and modern high-energy cybernetic synth beats.
aboutPage.para2: On this single historic stage, legends of cinema, statesmanship, and musical geniuses unite. It is not just a concert, but a cultural phenomenon that hosts more than 50 of the region's finest performers, 34 prestigious chief and special guests, and over 100,000 passionate music lovers.
aboutPage.para3: Designed with cutting-edge visual and sound production, the festival offers an immersive experience like no other. From sunrise classical symphonies to nighttime neon-lit electronic finales, Tamil Isai Sangamam is a monument to the sound that defines us.
aboutPage.navigateSubtitle: Quick links to navigate through the event spaces

about.title: About Tamil Isai Sangamam
about.subtitle: BRIDGING GENERATIONS THROUGH MUSIC
about.union_title: A Grand Union of Music & Heritage
about.p1: Tamil Isai Sangamam is South Asia's most spectacular, high-prestige music festival, celebrating the timeless spirit and monumental legacy of Tamil musical heritage. Held at the historic Jawaharlal Nehru Stadium in Chennai, this event bridges the gap between classical, traditional folk, nostalgic cinematic melodies, and modern high-energy cybernetic synth beats.
about.p2: On this single historic stage, legends of cinema, statesmanship, and musical geniuses unite. It is not just a concert, but a cultural phenomenon that hosts more than 50 of the region's finest performers, 34 prestigious chief and special guests, and over 100,000 passionate music lovers.
about.p3: Designed with cutting-edge visual and sound production, the festival offers an immersive experience like no other. From sunrise classical symphonies to nighttime neon-lit electronic finales, Tamil Isai Sangamam is a monument to the sound that defines us.
about.necessity_title: The Strategic Necessity of Stardom Hierarchy
about.chief_guest_desc: Chief Guests representing structural statesmanship and living cultural pillars provide crucial institutional validation to the festival. Their presence during ceremonial milestones, such as lighting the traditional Kuthu Vilakku, elevates the gathering from a commercial concert into a historical cultural milestone.
about.special_guest_desc: Special Guests from contemporary cinema act as anchors for pop-culture engagement. By matching prominent screen icons directly with legendary composers, the festival breaks digital barriers, generating viral live interactions and memorable stage reunions that captivate a cross-generational audience.
about.honouring_desc: Honouring Ceremonies serve as the emotional core of the 13-hour timeline. Pausing the intense audio production to actively celebrate veteran vocalists, lyricists, and musicians ensures that the pioneers who shaped our history are visibly respected and woven directly into modern digital spaces.
about.eventDetail: The event will be conducted on Thursday, October 1, 2026.

footer.madeWith: Crafted with passion for Tamil music heritage.
